matches.x: To the chief Musician, A Psalm of David the servant of the Lord. JHE wicked, who live in transgres-
To the chief Musician, A Psalm of David the servant of the Lord. JHE wicked, who live in transgres-

"A Psalm of David. Deliver me, O Lord, from the evil man; preserve me from the violent man; Solomon said (Proverbs 4:6), 'Do not forsake wisdom, and she will keep you.' (Proverbs 6:22) 'When you walk, they will lead you; when you lie down, they will watch over you.' So said the Lord to David, 'It is your desire that I preserve you; I will preserve you and keep you in the Torah,' as it says…
To the chief Musician, A Psalm of David the servant of the Lord. JHE wicked, who live in transgres-

And how they err in saying to a piece of wood: ‘Thou art my God,’ And to a stone: ‘ Thou art my Lord and thou art my deliverer.’ [And they have no heart.]
